creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Bartek Rutkowski from comment #11)
> Committed with small changes (added LICENSE_FILE), thanks for your work and
> for stepping up and taking care of that port!
> 
> In future, if you're having issues getting someone to look at your PR's,
> please see the
> https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/problem-reports/article.
> html#pr-followup for instructions on how to get someone's attention.
> 
> Kind regards,
> Bartek Rutkowski

Thank you for everything, Bartek Rutkowski!

--Chris
